ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publish_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Publication date */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Dataset identifier */,
  "abstract_mentions_covid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the abstract mentions COVID */,
  "pmcid" TEXT /* PubMed Central ID */,
  "pubmed_id" TEXT /* PubMed ID */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier */,
  "cord_uid" TEXT /* CORD UID for tracking */,
  "sha" TEXT /* SHA hash for the publication document */,
  "sims_scispacy_cord_uid" TEXT /* SciSpacy CORD UID for advanced analytics */,
  "sims_specter_cord_uid" TEXT /* Specter CORD UID for citation tracking */,
  "topic_weight" REAL /* Topic weight indicating relevance or significance */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the publication is published */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication type */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the publication */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Research areas or topics of the publication */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the publication */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the publication is released */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the publication */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is open access */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_dataset FOREIGN KEY ("dataset") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* h-index of the author */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations for the author */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is currently active in research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the dataset (e.g., public, private) */,
  "size_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cited_by" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citing publication */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited publication */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation is made */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cited_by_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cited_by_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor associated with the publication */,
  "altmetric_score" INTEGER /* Altmetric score of the publication */,
  "read_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been read */,
  "discussion_count" INTEGER /* Number of discussions or comments on the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type (e.g., article, chapter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number of the journal */,
  "journal_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the journal is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_journals" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "journal_id")
)
